channel.title: VoiceInk
channel.description: VoiceInk macOS dictation app — release feed

item.title: Version 0.5.004
item.description:
Distribution migration: DMG and Sparkle appcast move from GitHub Releases to GitHub Pages (`https://gendalf-warden.github.io/voiceink/`). The user-facing download URL is now a clean static page that lists only the DMG — no GitHub-generated source-code archives. Source remains in the same repository but is not surfaced in the install flow.
**Bridging release**: 0.5.004 is published to BOTH the old GitHub Releases URL (so already-installed 0.5.003 clients can find it via their baked-in `SUFeedURL`) and the new GH Pages URL. From 0.5.004 onwards the app's Info.plist references the new URL; subsequent releases publish only to GH Pages.
### Changed - `SUFeedURL` in Info.plist: `https://github.com/gendalf-warden/voiceink/releases/latest/download/appcast.xml` → `https://gendalf-warden.github.io/voiceink/appcast.xml` - `scripts/release.sh` now dual-publishes: pushes DMG + appcast.xml + latest.json + a regenerated index.html to the `gh-pages` branch, AND uploads the same DMG to a GitHub Release tag for 0.5.003 clients to discover this update. - Old GitHub Release tags (`v0.1b` … `v0.5.003`) will be deleted after the migration completes.
